skills.description: Scans .NET code for ~50 performance anti-patterns across async, memory, strings, collections, LINQ, regex, serialization, and I/O with tiered severity classification. Use when analyzing .NET code for optimization opportunities.

skills.name: android-tombstone-symbolication
skills.description: Symbolicate the .NET runtime frames in an Android tombstone file. Extracts BuildIds and PC offsets, downloads debug symbols from the Microsoft symbol server, and runs llvm-symbolizer to produce function names with source locations.

skills.name: clr-activation-debugging
skills.description: Diagnoses .NET Framework CLR activation issues using CLR activation logs. Use when the shim picks the wrong runtime, fails to load any runtime, or shows unexpected .NET Feature-on-Demand (FOD) dialogs.

skills.name: dotnet-trace-collect
skills.description: Guide developers through capturing diagnostic artifacts to diagnose production .NET performance issues. Use when choosing diagnostic tools, collecting performance data, or understanding tool trade-offs across different environments.

skills.name: dump-collect
skills.description: Configure and collect crash dumps for modern .NET applications. USE FOR: enabling automatic crash dumps for CoreCLR or NativeAOT, capturing dumps from running processes, setting up dump collection in Docker or Kubernetes.

skills.name: microbenchmarking
skills.description: Activate when BenchmarkDotNet is involved — creating, running, configuring, or reviewing BDN benchmarks. Also activate when microbenchmarking .NET code would be useful and BenchmarkDotNet is the likely tool.

skills.name: dotnet-maui-doctor
skills.description: Diagnoses and fixes .NET MAUI development environment issues. Validates .NET SDK, workloads, Java JDK, Android SDK, Xcode, and Windows SDK. Use when setting up MAUI development or encountering build errors.

skills.name: binlog-failure-analysis
skills.description: Skill for .NET/MSBuild *.binlog files and complicated build failures. Uses binary log replay to text logs for comprehensive build failure analysis. Only activate in MSBuild/.NET build context.

skills.name: binlog-generation
skills.description: Pass /bl:{} to generate a unique binlog filename automatically on every .NET/MSBuild build for diagnostic purposes. Only activate in MSBuild/.NET build context.

skills.name: build-parallelism
skills.description: Guide for optimizing MSBuild build parallelism and multi-project scheduling. Use when builds are not utilizing all CPU cores or when evaluating graph build mode with /maxcpucount.

skills.name: build-perf-baseline
skills.description: Establish build performance baselines and apply systematic optimization techniques including MSBuild Server, static graph builds, and artifacts output cache. Use when diagnosing slow builds.

skills.name: build-perf-diagnostics
skills.description: Reference knowledge for diagnosing MSBuild build performance issues. Use when builds are slow, to identify bottlenecks using binary log analysis covering timeline, node utilization, and expensive targets.

skills.name: check-bin-obj-clash
skills.description: Detects MSBuild projects with conflicting OutputPath or IntermediateOutputPath. Use when builds fail with file access errors, missing outputs, or intermittent failures from multiple projects writing to the same bin/obj directories.

skills.name: directory-build-organization
skills.description: Guide for organizing MSBuild infrastructure with Directory.Build.props, Directory.Build.targets, Directory.Packages.props, and Directory.Build.rsp. Use when structuring multi-project repos or implementing central package management.

skills.name: eval-performance
skills.description: Guide for diagnosing and improving MSBuild project evaluation performance. Use when builds are slow before any compilation starts, evaluation time is high in binlog analysis, or dealing with expensive glob patterns.

skills.name: including-generated-files
skills.description: Proper handling of files generated during the MSBuild build process. Use when generated files are not being included in compilation or when globs aren't capturing generated files correctly.

skills.name: incremental-build
skills.description: Guide for optimizing MSBuild incremental builds. Use when builds are slower than expected on subsequent runs or when diagnosing why incremental builds are broken with Inputs/Outputs on targets.

skills.name: msbuild-antipatterns
skills.description: Catalog of MSBuild anti-patterns with detection rules and fix recipes. Use when reviewing, auditing, or cleaning up .csproj, .vbproj, .fsproj, .props, .targets, or .proj files.

skills.name: msbuild-modernization
skills.description: Guide for modernizing and migrating MSBuild project files to SDK-style format. Use when encountering legacy .csproj/.vbproj files with verbose XML, packages.config, or AssemblyInfo.cs patterns.

skills.name: run-tests

skills.name: dotnet-aot-compat
skills.description: Make .NET projects compatible with Native AOT and trimming by systematically resolving IL trim/AOT analyzer warnings. USE FOR: AOT-compatible projects, fixing trimming warnings, resolving IL2026/IL2070/IL3050 warnings.

skills.name: migrate-dotnet10-to-dotnet11
skills.description: Migrate a .NET 10 project or solution to .NET 11 and resolve all breaking changes including upgrading TargetFramework from net10.0 to net11.0 and fixing build errors after updating the SDK.

skills.name: migrate-dotnet8-to-dotnet9

skills.name: migrate-dotnet9-to-dotnet10
skills.description: Migrate a .NET 9 project or solution to .NET 10 and resolve all breaking changes in .NET 10 / C# 14 / ASP.NET Core 10 / EF Core 10.

skills.name: migrate-nullable-references

skills.name: thread-abort-migration
skills.description: Guides migration of .NET Framework Thread.Abort usage to cooperative cancellation in modern .NET. USE FOR: modernizing code that calls Thread.Abort, catching ThreadAbortException, or uses Thread.Interrupt for termination.

skills.name: csharp-scripts

skills.name: nuget-trusted-publishing
